marketState: neutral with a mild bearish lean (storage surplus outweighs seasonal heat support)
summary: Price ($2.904) sits almost exactly at fair value ($2.923, band $2.423-$3.423, FAIR status), so there is no clean mispricing edge right now. Seasonality gives a weak signal (probHigher only 38% at 3-4 weeks, typical 4w move -1.4%) and is explicitly flagged Low reliability, so it should not be weighted heavily. Near-term weather demand is well above the 5-year norm (+19.4%, near the top of its range) which is supportive for the next 1-7 days, but the 8-16 day outlook cools off sharply (+4.1%) and 24h demand is already falling (-10.0). Further down the stack, storage is bearish (+180 Bcf surplus vs 5y and a +22 Bcf bullish-supply surprise vs forecast) and managed money is net short but not at an extreme (35th percentile), while daily/weekly technicals show a bearish EMA cross and RSI in the mid-30s. Net effect: no strong directional edge, but the weight of secondary evidence (storage, COT, higher-timeframe trend) tilts the medium-term picture slightly bearish while near-term heat can still support a short-lived bounce.

longTerm.rationale: Storage surplus (+180 Bcf vs 5y) plus a bearish build surprise (+22 Bcf) signals ample supply into the fall, and the daily/weekly trend is bearish (EMA 50<200, RSI ~37) with managed money already net short. Seasonality itself is only weakly bearish (38% prob higher at 3-4 weeks) and flagged Low reliability, so this is a secondary-data-driven, low-conviction short rather than a high-confidence call.
longTerm.invalidation: A sustained push and close above the fair-value upper band (~$3.42), a storage deficit vs 5y, or managed money flipping meaningfully net long would invalidate the bearish medium-term thesis.

shortTerm.rationale: 1-7 day weather demand is +19.4% vs the 5-year norm and near the top of its range (rangePos 0.8), and fair value itself is drifting higher over the next 7-21 days ($2.923 -> $3.022), supporting a near-term bounce even though price is currently rated FAIR. Intraday technicals (5m bullish, 15m/1h neutral) are not fighting this, unlike the more bearish daily/weekly picture.
shortTerm.invalidation: If demand_1_7D pctVs5y drops back toward normal (confirming the -10.0 24h cooling trend) or price breaks and holds below $2.78, the near-term heat-demand long thesis fails.
